commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Et Petrus similia dicit in Epistola: "Ut fides vestra et spes sit in Deum, cure animas vestras castas effeceritis in obedientia veritatis; "

commentaries.author: Polycarp of Smyrna
commentaries.content: And truth, as those who have forsaken the vain, empty talk and error of the multitude, and "believed in Him who raised up our Lord Jesus Christ from the dead, and gave Him glory"
